instructions.instruction: Use this skill before writing ANY PubSub or real-time broadcast code.

instructions.instruction: **Verify with a test** — call the context function and assert the LiveView reflects the change

instructions.instruction: **Subscription not firing?** Verify the LiveView is fully connected: subscriptions inside `if connected?(socket)` only run after WebSocket upgrade, not on the initial static render.
